title: Hulk
body:
# Hulk

Adds hulk abilities to minecraft.

Use `Right Shift` to transform into hulk.

Once you transformed into hulk,
you can boost yourself through the air, smash blocks and entities or pickup entities and throw them away!

Use the Thunderclap ability to kill enemies.

This mod was made for an youtube video and probably won't receive much updates:

<iframe width="1903" height="764" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/su2cWNcWdSE" title="Ich code MINECRAFT SUPERKRÄFTE in 1 Minute, 1 Stunde und 1 Tag" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
